name: Freelance Mutual NDA - v3 (2026)
description: Mutual non-disclosure for freelance design engagements. Used with Briarwood and Salt Marsh.

name: One-Way NDA - receiving party (v2)
description: One-way NDA where Angela is the receiving party (Briarwood placement service internals).

name: Freelance SOW - flat-fee (v4)
description: Statement of work for flat-fee engagements. Net-30 by default.

name: Freelance SOW - hourly (v2)
description: Hourly SOW template (rarely used; kept for maintenance work).

name: Model / likeness release
description: For photographing playtesters or including kids in signage.

name: Portfolio use permission - freelance work
description: Client permission to include the completed work in angelabrooks.design portfolio.

name: W-9 - Angela Brooks (individual)
description: Angela's W-9 template pre-filled. Sent to clients on kickoff.

name: Invoice acknowledgment - flat-fee freelance
description: Client counter-sign on invoice terms + delivery scope confirmation.

name: Late payment reminder (unused as of Oct 2026)
description: Template Angela built but has not sent. All clients paid on time so far.

name: Kickoff call agenda + deliverables checklist
description: Not a signable doc - used as an attachment.

name: CID Makerspace - tool checkout agreement
description: Signed each semester by students borrowing Makerspace equipment (Marcus Webb owner).

name: CID - Senior Thesis Studio I authorization
description: Thesis project authorization signed by student + advisor (Prof. Yuki Nakamura).

name: CID - Capstone Prep deliverables acknowledgment
description: Signed by student + instructor Hana Ito, Fall 2026 cohort.

name: CID Portfolio review - playtester model release
description: Model release for playtesters recorded during portfolio review demos.

name: CID Cohort - photo release (indie showcase)
description: Photo release for cohort members displayed on CID marketing.

name: Cascadia Indie Showcase - exhibitor agreement (Nov 8, 2026)
description: Booth exhibitor terms, liability waiver, load-in windows, card-reader terms.

name: Cascadia Indie Showcase - general liability waiver
description: Signed by every exhibitor + attendee volunteering with organizers.

name: Cascadia Indie Showcase - press pass acknowledgment
description: Press outlet signs to receive a Nov 8 press pass. Angela handles her own outlet list.

name: Cascadia Indie Showcase - media likeness release (exhibitors)
description: Exhibitor consent to be photographed/filmed during Nov 8 event.

name: Briarwood Tutoring Co-op - Master Services Agreement (vendors)
description: Umbrella agreement Briarwood uses for freelance/vendor engagements. Angela countersigned Jan 2026.

name: Briarwood Tutoring Co-op - Data Processing Addendum
description: DPA for handling learner data. Angela countersigned as part of vendor onboarding.

name: Harborview Wellness Studio - vendor intake
description: Small-business intake form for retained freelancers.

name: Greenleaf Youth Arts - small-job SOW
description: Template Zoe Park uses for recurring small design jobs (recital flyer, signage).

name: Greenleaf Youth Arts - youth photo release (parent-signed)
description: Parent/guardian consent for showing kids on signage. Angela does not sign - reference only.
